examples: Kanchi was just about to go and get some rice from Gopal Bhakta, the shopkeeper who knew her well and let her buy food on credit, when her son arrived, carrying a polythene bag with oranges.
"The Congress wants to give a clear message that it will not tolerate any corruption charges, " Bhakta Charan Das, a Congress party spokesman, said earlier in the day about Mr. Bansal's resignation.
